---
title: "Knowledge about head and neck cancer among adolescents"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Vasconcellos, Vinicius M.
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Hojaij, Flavio Carneiro
  - name: Alves, Edevaldo Miguel
  - name: Martins, Beatriz Costa N.
  - name: Nava, Arthur C.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 91
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101608"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Knowledge about head and neck cancer among adolescents</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
